examples: Results: The IOP level of myopic patients went up with diopter increasing.
Objective: To observe the pupil diameter changes of different diopter under different rays.
With age increasing, the diopter of these subjects had a tendency of hypermetropia from myopia.
The X-5 features an electronic viewfinder with diopter adjustment for a clear view of the subject even under bright sunshine.
Its diopter adjustment mechanism assures the user of the clearest view of both subject and viewfinder display, while minimizing eye fatigue during extended shooting sessions.
